title: Initialize Tauri 2.0 Project Structure
description: Create the base Tauri 2.0 project with proper directory structure. Set up the Rust backend in src-tauri/, React frontend in src/, and configure Cargo.toml and package.json with all required dependencies. Include tauri-plugin-sql for SQLite, tauri-plugin-shell for subprocess management, and tauri-plugin-websocket for real-time communication.
acceptance_criteria: npm create tauri-app completes successfully with React + TypeScript template
Cargo.toml includes tauri 2.0, tauri-plugin-sql, tauri-plugin-shell, tauri-plugin-websocket
Project structure follows Tauri 2.0 conventions with src-tauri/ and src/ directories
npm run tauri dev launches application window without errors
agent_output: Tauri 2.0 project initialized with React TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and all required dependencies. IPC bridge implemented.
